description: A candid, grainy daytime arrest photograph with only a minimal ICE logo and call-to-action overlay (no slogan-style meme design). The photo, apparently shot covertly through a vehicle window, shows several plainclothes officers in body armor making an arrest beside a tan sedan in a residential area with bare trees and brick buildings behind. Visible vest markings include 'ATF POLICE' and 'POLICE'; a man in a white hoodie and jeans is being detained against the car (faces are blurred/pixelated). At lower left is a small white DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark, with a 'LEARN MORE' button and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom.' Because the only added design elements are the agency logo and a newsroom URL on an otherwise candid documentary arrest photo, it is classified as not a designed graphic. The tweet describes the arrest of a suspected Tren de Aragua (TdA) gang member with a prior firearms-smuggling conviction and thanks ATF. Intent is to publicize the arrest and drive traffic to the ICE newsroom.
notable_text: ICE; LEARN MORE; ICE.gov/newsroom; ATF POLICE / POLICE (apparel markings)
